meta.description: MindVault is a professional study workspace for notes, files, ideas, and focused planning.

a11y.searchLabel: Search notes, files, ideas, and tags

studyQuotes: Small focused blocks compound into real mastery.
Clarity beats intensity when the work needs to last.
Protect the next hour and the week starts to move.
One finished task is better than five half-open loops.
Review, refine, repeat. That is how knowledge sticks.

landing.eyebrow: Notes, files, ideas, and focus in one place
landing.headline: A cleaner workspace for
landing.intro: MindVault gives you a focused command center to capture notes, organize files, shape ideas, and track daily work in a clean interface.
landing.previewBody: A calm interface with professional depth and minimal visual noise.
landing.feat1Body: Create notes and search your vault from the command palette.
landing.feat2Body: Move ideas through a compact board and keep your focus list visible.
landing.feat3Body: Built with modern tools so you can ship with confidence from day one.

auth.signupHint: Start organizing your study material in a few seconds.
auth.loginHint: Sign in to continue your workspace.
auth.name: Name
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. If you do not have an account yet, please create one first.

toast.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
toast.workComplete: Work session complete! Take a break.

dash.subtitle: A live control room for notes, files, ideas, and deep work. Your highest-leverage next actions are ready.
dash.rhythmBody: Workspace activity over the last seven days.
dash.noActiveTasksBody: Add tasks in Focus to create a daily execution lane.
dash.nothingActiveBody: Move a research idea into Active or Review.
dash.noActivityBody: Create a note or save focus work.
dash.recentNotesBody: Fast access to your freshest study material.
dash.notebookEmptyBody: Capture a lecture, assignment, or research thread to start.

notes.title: Notes
notes.subtitle: Write markdown, organize folders, and mark important study material.
notes.emptyBody: Create a durable place for lectures, research, and revision plans.

graph.title: Knowledge graph
graph.subtitle: Explore notes and ideas as connected objects.
graph.selectHint: Click a graph object to inspect its details.

ideas.title: Ideas
ideas.subtitle: A compact board for projects, research threads, and next steps.

focus.title: Focus
focus.subtitle: Run the day from one clear execution surface: timer, tasks, and the one thing that matters.
focus.addTaskHint: Add a task to give the timer a clear target.
focus.sessionCompleteBody: Take a breath, then choose the next block.
focus.workCompleteBody: Take the scheduled break before your next block.
focus.breakCompleteBody: Ready for the next focused block.
focus.noTasksBody: Add one clear task to start a focused session.
